About Organization

Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University is a medical university located in Uttar Pradesh, India.

The university offers various courses in the field of medicine, including nursing.

About the Programme

The UP Common Nursing Entrance Test is a entrance exam for admission to nursing courses in Uttar Pradesh.

The exam is conducted by Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University.
